src: Updating curated list of research advancements on item identification and item tokenization in generative recommender systems. The survey is titled "A Survey of Item Identifiers in Generative Recommendation: Construction, Alignment, and Generation"
ja: 生成型推薦システムにおけるアイテム識別とアイテムトークン化の研究動向をまとめた厳選リスト（随時更新）。論文タイトル：「A Survey of Item Identifiers in Generative Recommendation: Construction, Alignment, and Generation」
